subcodes.title: Prayer for Friday
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God, O Beloved, that I should make mention of Thee through my remembrance, or that I should praise Thee in Thy dominion, for verily I recognize the bounds of mine own being as non-existent before Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم بسم الله الفرد الرحیم. سبحانک اللهم یا محبوب من ان اذکرک بذکری ایاک او ان اثنی فی ملکک اذ اننی اعرف حد کینونیتی بانها معدومة عندک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @impossibility of true worship of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness
